title: Step 1: Create a New DefectFinder object
description:
Step 1: Create a New DefectFinder object

Step 1: Create a New DefectFinder Object

	Click the [All Tools] - [ DefectFinder]
	 button  on the Vision Guide toolbar.
	Move the mouse over the image display. You will see
	 the mouse pointer change to the DefectFinder object icon.
	Continue moving the mouse until the icon is at the
	 desired position in the image display, then click the left mouse button
	 to create the object.
	Notice that a name for the
	 object is automatically created. In the example, it is called "DefFind01"
	 because this is the first DefectFinder object created for this sequence.
	 (We will explain how to change the name later.)
